ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On May 15, 2003
Off Calendar Jun-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Lester Sachs, Esq. for Plaintiff Jose Jimenez also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant 901 Post St., Inc.
Principal of $69,000.00
Penalty of $15,256.68
Attorney's fees of $11,055.00
Costs of $372.45
Interest of $15,422.80. For the total of $111,106.93
Judgment signed in open court.

Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am. On June 12, 2003
